    Performs the cancelBooking operation.
    CancelBooking - Class in bcu.cmp5332.bookingsystem.commands
    Usage: cancel [bookingId] - User cancels their booking cancelbooking [customerId] [bookingId] - Admin cancels customer's booking

    Constructor for cancelling a specific booking
